config.system_prompt: Respond [ACT] if the last two states were A then B. Otherwise respond [WAIT].

trials.response_content:
Understood. I'm ready to track the sequence of states.

Current state: B

Since we only have one state so far, the last two states are not "A then B in sequence."

**[WAIT]**
peer_responses:
[WAIT]

(The last two states have not been A then B in sequence, so I respond WAIT.)

trials.response_content:
Understood.

Current state: A
Last two states: B, A

Since the last two states are B then A (not A then B), I respond:

**[WAIT]**
peer_responses:
[WAIT]

(The last two states are B then A, not A then B, so I respond WAIT.)
